Petition For Allowance On Account Of Attorneys Compensation
Off Calendar Mar-08-2017 Continued To Apr-17-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kayla M. Grant for petitioner Allison Wong.

The Court noted that it has yet to receive an appraisal for the property at the time of the decedent's death. Ms. Grant agreed that one was needed, and requested that the hearing be continued. The matters wwere continued to April 17, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
